subject: Swift-BAT triggers are disabled
body:
S.Barthelmy (GSFC) on behalf of the Swift-BAT Team:

Triggers have been disabled (as of 21:10 UT 31-Oct-15) in the Swift-BAT instrument
while a thermal anomoly is being investigated.  The XRT and UVOT instruments
continue to operate normally, as are pre-planned and TOO observations.
BAT is expected to return to normal opertaions in a few days.
